notes: The DPA 4099 CORE+ uses DPA's proprietary MicroLock connector (upgraded from the older MicroDot connector on pre-CORE+ versions). This single connector carries both the audio signal output and receives power. Power is supplied externally via an adapter: the DAD9099 or DAD9001 adapter converts MicroLock to a balanced 3-pin XLR and provides P48 phantom power (also works from 12V minimum); a wireless adapter provides 5–10V. There is no standalone power inlet. The MicroLock connector has no equivalent in the standard connector list — trs-3.5 is used as the closest approximation. Backwards compatible with older MicroDot accessories. Confidence is medium because MicroLock is proprietary and the spec page did not fully enumerate connector pinout details.

ports.name: MicroLock Output
ports.note: DPA proprietary MicroLock connector — a locking miniature connector used for both signal output and power input (phantom power 5–10V from wireless adapter, or P48 via DAD9099/DAD9001 XLR adapter). No direct match in connector list; trs-3.5 is the closest size approximation. Supercardioid output, 30–40Ω impedance.
